headline: Strategic thinking, AI-powered Excel, and smarter project tools are what consultants need rn

stories.title: Strategic Thinking Skills Are What Really Set Top Consultants Apart
stories.summary: Lowkey, the best consultants aren't just problem-solvers—they're strategic thinkers who zoom out and guide clients toward long-term wins. Mastering how to evaluate market dynamics and align recommendations with business goals is literally the top-tier skill firms are hiring for.
stories.takeaway: Start practicing SWOT analyses and industry benchmarking now. It's the difference between being a consultant and being a trusted advisor.

stories.title: ChatGPT for Excel Just Launched and It's Lowkey Game-Changing
stories.summary: ChatGPT for Excel is now in beta (dropped March 5), and fr it lets you build, update, and analyze spreadsheets using plain language instead of wrestling with formulas. Teams can describe what they need and ChatGPT creates or updates models directly in the workbook.
stories.takeaway: Ask ChatGPT what you're trying to calculate instead of googling formulas. Save hours on data analysis, scenario modeling, and manual reconciliation.

stories.title: Rocketlane Is Built for Consultants (Not Generic Project Managers)
stories.summary: Most consultants are stuck using tools not designed for their workflow. Rocketlane actually solves this—it handles staffing, budgets, and client collab all in one platform, with AI-powered resource allocation to keep teams from burning out.
stories.takeaway: Stop juggling 5 tools. Use something built for consulting workflows so you can actually track profitability and client engagement without losing your mind.

watchNext.title: How to Use AI in Excel with Copilot
watchNext.why: Tbh if you're still not using Copilot in Excel, you're wasting time. Learn how to leverage it for data cleaning, formula generation, and turning messy sheets into shareable insights in minutes.

watchNext.title: The Rise of AI Tools for Consultants in 2026
watchNext.why: Check this breakdown of 11 AI tools actually reshaping consulting—from Tableau AI for insights to Think Cell for presentations. Worth knowing what's out there before your firm adopts something.
